pi_items.source: Task description explicitly requires querying this SQLite database path.
Task description explicitly requires the dot file to be saved to this path.
Task description explicitly states the Talon Python module and .talon command file should be created in this directory.

privileged_info_summary: I discovered that the task is defective. Critical scripts (setup_task.ps1, export_result.ps1) and the underlying SQLite database (caviar.db) are entirely missing from the environment, which breaks the verifier completely because it attempts to read the non-existent task_result.json output file. The target directory structure requirements and expected file paths exactly match the explicit instructions provided in the prompt description.
